creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I need some more information.

Are you using quarterly or latest packages?

Please also try forcing reinstallation of the sqlite package and calibre package itself.

No need to file another bug report, the maintainer of py-apsw is CCed.

The thing looks like some library got updated from below another one and now there is a missing symbol, but I'm not sure what needs to be changed to get this straight. I need to do some trial and error. There could be also some bigger issue behind this but I really don't know right away.
